title: tithonia paneroi
intro: Tithonia paneroi, also known as tree marigold, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Tithonia paneroi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
